headline: This One ETF Gives Retirees Quiet Exposure to AI Infrastructure REITs
summary: Income investors hunting for AI infrastructure exposure often land on Pacer Data & Infrastructure Real Estate ETF (NYSEARCA:SRVR). The fund packages data centers, cell towers, and related digital infrastructure REITs into a single, low-cost wrapper. The dividend safety question is more nuanced than the appeal. How SRVR Generates Its Income SRVR’s yield comes entirely from ... This One ETF Gives Retirees Quiet Exposure to AI Infrastructure REITs
